label: Firmware PAC sendFile
info: Import-only Besiter firmware update flow. Metadata endpoints return the PAC package from the Node-RED VM and include a dashboard request id in the download URL when available. The stream route records range progress into firmwareUpdateSessions.

name: Firmware PAC metadata + VM streamed download with dashboard status
Disable old firmware routes first. Metadata returns /firmware-stream/:requestId/20260409-Chargerent-1.1.1.0-OU-FOTA.pac and updates firmwareUpdateSessions.
Build firmware metadata
Send PAC with res.sendFile
